gist.headline: Mapping the hive mind
gist.blurb: We've officially added embeddings to the API! Now you can turn your text into neat little vectors to help your apps understand context and search smarter.
gist.summary: Added full support for text embeddings via a new /v1/embeddings endpoint, complete with model registries, API key scoping, and pricing UI.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate vector embeddings directly through the API to power semantic search, RAG, and clustering in their applications.
gist.visual_concept: Embeddings turn text into structured vectors. Visual metaphor: organizing raw text into neat, structured, glowing data cubes or seeds. Polly the bee and Nomnom working together to process information.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, organizing glowing numbered cubes into a neat garden grid. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of text documents and produces the glowing cubes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
